commands.review_summary:
The PR passes the budget-derived Codex context projection cap into both legacy mirrored-history fallback projections and adds a regression test for large legacy context.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +27. Total +39 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main omits maxRenderedContextChars on both no-active-context-engine legacy projection calls, and the projection helper defaults omitted caps to 24,000 rendered characters. I did not run a live high-window Codex session in this read-only review.
